Set up your free social media subdomain!
Your domain comes with free, customizable subdomains  such as facebook.aadharcha.in to link to your social media page.
Improved SEO
Social subdomains can help your website rank higher in search engines.
Promote your social page
Anybody visiting your social subdomain such as facebook.aadharcha.in will see your social media page.
Add to your main domain
Creating a social subdomain won't affect anything currently connected to aadharcha.in.

Success
Your DNS record has been updated successfully. Most DNS updates take effect within an hour, but could take up to 48 hours to update globally.
